title: Add social links, Join Us, Contact, and featured notice to site

requirements.summary: Update Contact page with official Join Us and Contact Us buttons linking to external Awami League resources
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Join Us' button is visible on the Contact page and links to https://www.albd.org/join-us/ opening in a new tab.
A 'Contact Us' button or section is visible on the Contact page and links to https://www.albd.org/pages/contact-en opening in a new tab.
Both buttons are styled consistently with the site's existing green/gold/cream theme.

file_operations.description: Add two prominent call-to-action buttons below or within the existing membership section: a 'Join Us' button linking to https://www.albd.org/join-us/ and a 'Contact Us' button linking to https://www.albd.org/pages/contact-en. Both must use target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'. Style the buttons using the site's primary green color with hover states, ensuring visual consistency with the existing Tailwind theme and OKLCH color tokens defined in frontend/src/index.css.

requirements.summary: Add Facebook, Twitter/X, and YouTube social media links to the site-wide footer
acceptanceCriteria: Facebook link to https://www.facebook.com/awamileague.1949/ is present in the footer and opens in a new tab.
Twitter/X link to https://twitter.com/albd1971 is present in the footer and opens in a new tab.
YouTube link to https://www.youtube.com/user/myalbd/ is present in the footer and opens in a new tab.
All three social links are visually grouped in a dedicated 'Follow Us' or equivalent subsection.
All links use `target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'`.

file_operations.description: Add a new 'Follow Us' subsection to the footer containing three social media icon links: Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/awamileague.1949/), Twitter/X (https://twitter.com/albd1971), and YouTube (https://www.youtube.com/user/myalbd/). Use Lucide React icons (Facebook, Twitter, Youtube) to render recognizable social icons. Position the social links section in the existing footer grid structure. All links must use target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer' and maintain consistent styling with the footer's green/gold/cream theme and existing link hover states.

requirements.summary: Add a Join Us call-to-action button to the site-wide Navbar for both desktop and mobile views
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Join Us' button appears in the desktop navbar linking to https://www.albd.org/join-us/ and opening in a new tab.
The same 'Join Us' button appears in the mobile hamburger menu.
The button is visually distinct from regular nav links (e.g., accented colour).
The link uses `target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'`.

file_operations.description: Add a 'Join Us' button after the existing navigation items in both the desktop menu and mobile hamburger menu. The button should link to https://www.albd.org/join-us/ with target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'. Style it as a distinct call-to-action using an outlined or filled button treatment with gold or red accent colors (e.g., border-gold-500 text-gold-600 hover:bg-gold-50 or similar) to differentiate it from regular nav links. Ensure the button is visible and properly aligned in both desktop flex row and mobile menu layouts.

requirements.summary: Add a featured notice banner to the homepage highlighting the Sajeeb Wazed article with a Read More link
acceptanceCriteria: A featured notice card or banner is visible on the homepage.
The notice includes a heading such as 'Latest Notice' or 'Featured Announcement'.
The notice includes the article title 'Sajeeb Wazed Urges International Community to Save Bangladesh from Falling in Grasp of Islamic Extremists' as a summary or subheading.
A 'Read More' or equivalent link opens https://www.albd.org/articles/news/41681/Sajeeb-Wazed-Urges-International-Community-to-Save-Bangladesh-from-Falling-in-Grasp-of-Islamic-Extremists in a new tab.
The link uses `target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'`.
The notice is styled consistently with the site's green/gold/cream theme.

file_operations.description: Insert a prominent featured notice card or banner below the hero section and above the KeyFactsStrip. The notice should include a heading 'Latest Notice' or 'Featured Announcement', display the article title 'Sajeeb Wazed Urges International Community to Save Bangladesh from Falling in Grasp of Islamic Extremists' as a bold subheading or summary, and provide a 'Read More' button or link that opens https://www.albd.org/articles/news/41681/Sajeeb-Wazed-Urges-International-Community-to-Save-Bangladesh-from-Falling-in-Grasp-of-Islamic-Extremists in a new tab with target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'. Style the notice with a card background using the site's green/gold/cream theme, consistent border, shadow, and padding to ensure visual prominence.

requirements.summary: Add a Join Us link to the footer navigation links section
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Join Us' link appears in the footer navigation links section.
The link points to https://www.albd.org/join-us/ and opens in a new tab.
The link uses `target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'`.
The link is styled consistently with existing footer navigation links.

file_operations.description: Add a 'Join Us' link to the existing navigation links column in the footer (where Resources and other nav links are displayed). The link should point to https://www.albd.org/join-us/ with target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer' and maintain the same styling as the existing footer nav links (text color, hover states, font weight). Position it logically within the navigation list, e.g., after the main site sections or as the last item in the column.
